Homebrew Formulae

lilypond

Install command:

Music engraving system

https://lilypond.org

License: GPL-3.0-or-later AND GPL-3.0-only AND OFL-1.1-RFN AND GFDL-1.3-no-invariants-or-later AND LicenseRef-Homebrew-public-domain AND MIT AND AGPL-3.0-only AND LPPL-1.3c

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/lilypond.json

Formula code: lilypond.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

macOS on
Apple Silicon		 tahoe ✅
sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅
macOS on
Intel		 sonoma ✅
Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 2.26.0
head ⚡️ HEAD

Depends on:

bdw-gc 8.2.12 Garbage collector for C and C++
cairo 1.18.4 Vector graphics library with cross-device output support
fontconfig 2.18.1 XML-based font configuration API for X Windows
freetype 2.14.3 Software library to render fonts
ghostscript 10.07.1 Interpreter for PostScript and PDF
glib 2.88.1 Core application library for C
guile 3.0.11 GNU Ubiquitous Intelligent Language for Extensions
libpng 1.6.58 Library for manipulating PNG images
pango 1.57.1 Framework for layout and rendering of i18n text
python@3.14 3.14.6 Interpreted, interactive, object-oriented programming language
gettext 1.0 GNU internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n) library
harfbuzz 14.2.1 OpenType text shaping engine

Depends on when building from source:

bison 3.8.2 Parser generator
fontforge 20251009 Command-line outline and bitmap font editor/converter
gettext 1.0 GNU internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n) library
pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
t1utils 1.42 Command-line tools for dealing with Type 1 fonts
texinfo 7.3 Official documentation format of the GNU project
texlive 20260301 Free software distribution for the TeX typesetting system
make 4.4.1 Utility for directing compilation
